title: cynometra cynometroides
intro: Cynometra cynometroides, also known as the kanju tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cynometra cynometroides include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and even exhibit antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Cynometra cynometroides can be found in the form of decoctions, infusions, and extracts, often used to treat various ailments in traditional medicine.
